## Skill/Command Contribution

**Name**:
**Type**: [ ] Command / [ ] Skill

## Description

What does this skill/command do? When should it be used?

## Checklist

- [ ] Frontmatter includes `name` and `description`
- [ ] No hardcoded absolute paths
- [ ] No secrets or API keys
- [ ] Description under 200 characters
- [ ] Tested in a new Claude Code session
- [ ] Body under 500 lines (skills) / 300 lines (commands)

## Testing

How did you test this? What project did you use?
